merged_topics.name: React Hooks
merged_topics.description: Hooks are functions that behave differently based on where they are called, allowing components to remember things across re-renders.

merged_topics.name: Class Components
merged_topics.description: Writing React with class components

merged_topics.name: State Management
merged_topics.description: State management refers to the process of storing and updating data in a component, with useState being a key hook for this purpose.

merged_topics.name: Component Re-renders
merged_topics.description: Components are functions that re-run on every render, with hooks helping them remember things across re-runs.

merged_topics.name: Hooks Best Practices
merged_topics.description: Hooks should not be called inside conditionals or loops, as this can cause React to lose track of state.

merged_topics.name: useState
merged_topics.description: A hook for managing state in functional components, allowing for initializer functions and setter functions.

merged_topics.name: Initializer Functions
merged_topics.description: Functions that run only once to compute initial state values, useful for expensive computations.

merged_topics.name: Setter Functions
merged_topics.description: Functions that update state, can take a value or a function, and should use the functional form when depending on old state.

merged_topics.name: React Strict Mode
merged_topics.description: A mode that helps catch potential issues, such as unexpected behavior when using useState.

merged_topics.name: useEffect
merged_topics.description: A React hook for handling side effects, such as subscriptions and data fetching.

merged_topics.name: Dependency Array
merged_topics.description: An array of values that the effect depends on, used to determine when to re-run the effect.

merged_topics.name: Data Fetching
merged_topics.description: The process of retrieving data from an API or other source, often using useEffect.

merged_topics.name: React Query
merged_topics.description: A data fetching library for React that handles caching and other features.

merged_topics.name: SWR
merged_topics.description: A data fetching library for React that handles caching and other features.

merged_topics.name: RTK Query
merged_topics.description: A data fetching library for React that handles caching and other features.

merged_topics.name: useRef
merged_topics.description: A hook that returns a mutable object with a .current property, useful for holding references to DOM nodes or mutable values without triggering re-renders.

merged_topics.name: DOM Node References
merged_topics.description: Holding a reference to a DOM node using useRef, allowing for actions like focusing on an input element.

merged_topics.name: Mutable Values
merged_topics.description: Holding mutable values across renders without triggering re-renders, useful for storing timer IDs or previous values.

merged_topics.name: Render Loops
merged_topics.description: A situation where a component re-renders excessively, often due to issues with the dependency array or state shape.

merged_topics.name: Custom Hooks
merged_topics.description: A function whose name starts with `use` and that calls other hooks, used to extract reusable stateful logic.

merged_topics.name: React State
merged_topics.description: State management in React, using hooks like useState.

merged_topics.name: Local Storage
merged_topics.description: A mechanism for storing data locally in the browser.

merged_topics.name: React Hooks Ecosystem
merged_topics.description: A collection of third-party hooks, like useDebounce and useMediaQuery, built on the custom hooks pattern.

merged_topics.name: useReducer
merged_topics.description: A hook for managing complex state updates with a reducer function.

merged_topics.name: useMemo
merged_topics.description: A hook for memoizing expensive computations.

merged_topics.name: useCallback
merged_topics.description: A hook for memoizing function references.

merged_topics.name: React Performance
merged_topics.description: Optimizing React application performance by identifying slow renders and applying memoization where necessary.

merged_topics.name: Memoization
merged_topics.description: Technique to improve performance by caching results of expensive function calls.

merged_topics.name: React DevTools Profiler
merged_topics.description: Tool for identifying performance bottlenecks in React applications.

merged_topics.name: Windowing
merged_topics.description: Technique for optimizing large lists by only rendering visible items.

merged_topics.name: react-window
merged_topics.description: Library for efficient rendering of large lists in React.

merged_topics.name: react-virtual
merged_topics.description: Library for virtualizing large lists in React.

merged_topics.name: Imperative Control
merged_topics.description: A concept where React controls the flow of an application
